'''falaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crabber|crabber]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-l-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crabber|crabber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| falaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fælæbæth|fælæbæth]] || [[word:fælæbæj|fælæbæj]] || [[word:fælæbæsh|fælæbæsh]] || [[word:fælæbæ|fælæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:falalabath|falalabath]] || [[word:falalabaj|falalabaj]] || [[word:falalabash|falalabash]] || [[word:falalaba|falalaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:falabath|falabath]] || [[word:falabaj|falabaj]] || [[word:falabash|falabash]] || [[word:falaba|falaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:falafbath|falafbath]] || [[word:falafbaj|falafbaj]] || [[word:falafbash|falafbash]] || [[word:falafbaf|falafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:falabatha|falabatha]] || [[word:falabaja|falabaja]] || [[word:falabasha|falabasha]] || [[word:falabaka|falabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:falabath|falabath]] || [[word:falabaj|falabaj]] || [[word:falabash|falabash]] || [[word:falaba|falaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:falabathal|falabathal]] || [[word:falabajal|falabajal]] || [[word:falabashal|falabashal]] || [[word:falabakal|falabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:falabathatha|falabathatha]] || [[word:falabajaja|falabajaja]] || [[word:falabashasha|falabashasha]] || [[word:falabaka|falabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:falabathan|falabathan]] || [[word:falabajan|falabajan]] || [[word:falabashan|falabashan]] || [[word:falabakan|falabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:falabathaoro|falabathaoro]] || [[word:falabajaoro|falabajaoro]] || [[word:falabashaoro|falabashaoro]] || [[word:falabakaoro|falabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
